src/main/java/org/main/voting/Controller.general_idea: Added imports for VBox and HBox layout containers to support the new admin UI structure.
Declared FXML-injected fields for the new admin login form, management tab, and logout controls.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Controller.human_impl: @FXML private VBox adminLoginForm; @FXML private TextField adminUsernameField; ...

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Controller.general_idea: Added an observable list to manage Admin entities in the UI, mirroring existing Candidate and Voter lists.
Added initialization logic for the admin table columns and data binding in the controller constructor.
Changed voter verification to fetch the full Voter object to check voting status explicitly, improving error messaging.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Controller.human_impl: Voter voter = Firebase.getVoterById(voterId); if (voter != null) { if (!voter.getHasVoted()) ... }

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Controller.general_idea: Introduced a confirmation dialog before casting a vote to prevent accidental submissions.
Moved voter data loading to a background thread to prevent UI freezing during Firebase calls.
Implemented admin login and logout functionality with UI state management.
Added functionality to create new admin accounts with password confirmation and existence checks.
Implemented loading of admin data from Firebase into the UI table.

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added imports for MessageDigest, NoSuchAlgorithmException, and Base64 to support password hashing functionality.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.human_impl: import java.security.MessageDigest; import java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException; import java.util.Base64;

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added imports for LocalDate and DateTimeFormatter to support timestamping admin creation dates.
Modified AUTH_PARAM construction to handle 'none' auth key by setting it to an empty string instead of appending '?auth=none'.
Added a constant for the 'admins' database node to support admin management features.
Refactored canVote to fetch all voters and iterate locally instead of relying on a direct URL lookup that assumed voterId was the key.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.human_impl: String response = getFromFirebase(VOTERS_NODE); ... for (String key : jsonResponse.keySet()) { ... }

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Refactored castVote to find the voter key by ID first, record the vote, then mark the voter as voted, with improved error handling.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.human_impl: String voterKey = null; ... for (String key : voters.keySet()) { ... } ... postToFirebase(VOTES_NODE, votePayload);

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added a new method to retrieve a specific voter object by their ID by iterating through all voters.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.human_impl: public static Voter getVoterById(String voterId) throws IOException { ... }

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added methods to authenticate admins, including support for default admin creation and password hashing verification.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.human_impl: public static boolean authenticateAdmin(String username, String password) throws IOException { ... }

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Added methods to add new admins, check if an admin exists, and retrieve all admins from the database.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.human_impl: public static void addAdmin(String username, String password) throws IOException { ... }

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Implemented a helper method to hash passwords using SHA-256 and Base64 encoding for secure storage.
src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.human_impl: private static String hashPassword(String password) { ... MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-256"); ... }

src/main/java/org/main/voting/Firebase.j.general_idea: Changed postToFirebase to log errors and return an empty string instead of throwing an IOException on non-200/201 responses.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
Add the missing JavaFX graphics dependency required for the application to run.
Add maven-jar-plugin to configure the JAR manifest with classpath and main class.
Add maven-shade-plugin to create an executable uber-jar with the main class.
Update the JavaFX plugin configuration to point to the new Launcher class instead of Main.

src/main/resources/org/main/voting/style.general_idea: Added password-field to the existing style rule for text fields and date pickers to ensure consistent styling.
Added CSS styles for the new admin login form and its associated buttons.

src/main/resources/org/main/voting/votin.general_idea: Moved management tabs (Candidates, Voters, Settings) from the main TabPane into a nested TabPane within a new Admin tab to implement role-based access.
src/main/resources/org/main/voting/votin.human_impl: Wrapped existing <Tab> elements inside a new <Tab text="Admin"> containing a nested <TabPane fx:id="adminTabPane">.

src/main/resources/org/main/voting/votin.general_idea: Added an admin login form and logout mechanism to secure the management features.
src/main/resources/org/main/voting/votin.human_impl: Added <VBox fx:id="adminLoginForm"> with username/password fields and a <Button fx:id="adminLogoutButton">.

src/main/resources/org/main/voting/votin.general_idea: Introduced a new tab for managing admin users, allowing creation of new admin accounts.
src/main/resources/org/main/voting/votin.human_impl: Added <Tab text="Admin Management"> with fields for username/password and a <TableView fx:id="adminTable">.
